CustomField.description: Should rent be billed for a partial period, the pro-rata number days can be calculated based on actual number of days in the month/year, or fixed 30/360.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Should rent be billed for a partial period, the pro-rata number days can be calculated based on actual number of days in the month/year, or fixed 30/360.
CustomField.label: _Pro-rata Number Of Days

value.fullName: Actual number of days in month/year
value.label: Actual number of days in month/year
